/usr/bin/gcc -g -static -static-libgfortran -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/test.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/stratification_comm.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/stratification.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/linalg.c.o -o test  -lgsl -lgslcblas /home/yinjia/Documents/stratification/stratification_bydp/lib/liblapacke.a /home/yinjia/Documents/stratification/stratification_bydp/lib/liblapack.a /home/yinjia/Documents/stratification/stratification_bydp/lib/librefblas.a -lm -lgfortran -lquadmath
